text.message: Not that I can plow you anyway, but I'm aiming for the wheat port, not to plow your sheep port OJ
all blue did was secure we both lose
not that--just wasn't the winning move for him either
insane that red gets a city before me haha
I cant even keep 8 cards for a roll on here
8 s and 10s---blue's bs placement paying off--lol
You gave me three seconds to respond
why did you have me embargod
Why didn’t steal from me when oj ahead
Well, nobody’s trying to give you the win
not sure where you think anyone but your or red would be getting brck from
no clue how i have kept army over blue
he lost tempo going for the 3 4 8
Cuz u mono d all my ore
you blue and red are all a few good rolls away from winning
u need me to take road
me doing everything I can to stall your tempo
